name: Layered Lettuce Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb. bacon, cooked and diced or use bacon bits
recipeInstructions:
1 Layer the first 5 ingredients in a large glass bowl.
2 In a separate bowl, mix together the mayonnaise, sugar, and vinegar.
3 Spread the dressing mixture over top of the salad to seal completely.
4 Top with grated cheese.
5 Cover and refrigerate overnight.
6 Toss before serving.
Great summer salad. Enjoy.
